text: WAF Rules @ wmitemanie @ st * Type, Statement, Action * Type : Regular or Rate-based e Statement : (WHAT to match) or (COUNT ALL) or (WHAT & COUNT) e .. origin country, IP, label, header, cookies, query parameter, URI path, query string, body (first 8192 bytes ONLY), HTTP method ¢ Single, AND, OR, NOT e Action : Allow*, Block, Count, Captcha.... Custom Response (x-amzn-waf-), Label e .. labels can be referenced later in the same WEBACL ..multi-stage flows * ALLOW & BLOCK stop processing, Count/Captcha actions continue
